message:
feat: improve config TUI with always-visible descriptions and action buttons

Enhances configuration UI for better usability and clearer interaction:

Always-Visible Descriptions:
- Show helpful text for all fields, not just focused ones
- Reduces janky feeling from changing descriptions
- Users always know what each option does
- Consistent layout regardless of focus state

Action Buttons:
- Add "💾 Save Configuration" and "❌ Cancel" buttons at bottom
- Navigate to buttons with arrow keys like other fields
- Enter key activates save/cancel from buttons
- Clear visual separation with "Actions" section header

Interaction Improvements:
- Enter key on Save button saves and exits
- Enter key on Cancel button exits without saving
- Keyboard shortcuts (s/q) still work as before
- Better button styling and focus indicators

Layout Structure:
🐳 Container Runtime
  [runtime selection with description]

🔐 Credentials
  [each credential with description always shown]

Actions
  💾 Save Configuration
    Save changes to config file
  ❌ Cancel
    Exit without saving changes

Benefits:
- ✅ Less janky - descriptions always visible
- ✅ Clear actions - obvious save/cancel buttons
- ✅ Better navigation - buttons are part of field flow
- ✅ Consistent experience - no content jumping around

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
